title: Scid vs. PC
text: Home * User Interface * GUI * Scid vs. PC Home * Software * Databases * Scid vs. PC Scid vs. PC Logo [1] Scid vs. PC , an open source Chess GUI with the ability to run detailed chess analysis, to create and query huge databases , to play on-line with FICS and against computer opponents, and to manage computer tournaments . It is a fork of Shane Hudson's Chess Information Database ( SCID ), started in 2009 by Steven Atkinson , and requires installation of Tcl/Tk [2] . Scid vs. PC runs under Linux , Mac OS and Windows computers, supporting Chess Engine Communication Protocol and UCI compliant engines.
